steps.title: First account: annual contribution
steps.content: Depositing $x$ dollars once per month for 12 months yields $$12x \text{ dollars}$$

steps.title: Second account and total equation
steps.content:
Depositing $y$ dollars twice per month for 12 months yields $2 \times 12 = 24$ deposits, totaling $$24y \text{ dollars}$$
The sum of both accounts equals \$4,300: $$4,300 = 12x + 24y$$ That matches choice B — B is correct.
